name: precedent-brief
description: AI-powered legal research triage app - combined startup orchestration

scripts.setup:python: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt
scripts.predev: npm run setup:env && npm run setup:check
scripts.dev: concurrently --prefix "[{name}]" --names "MCP,Backend,Frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" --kill-others "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
